hero_match.title: New Zealand vs South Africa 3rd T20I (Result: NZ won by 9 wickets)

ranked_matches.title: AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025 (Tournament Concluded)

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 3rd T20I concluded today, with New Zealand winning by 9 wickets to take a 2-1 series lead. The Sheffield Shield Final is scheduled for later this month. No matches were found for Chandigarh T20 or AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025 today.
